scripts.s3:test:up: docker compose -f ../docker-compose.dev.yml up -d minio && docker compose -f ../docker-compose.dev.yml up --force-recreate minio-init
scripts.test:artifact-gate: yarn exec node --import tsx scripts/checkArtifactGateEnv.ts && yarn exec vitest run test/mode-all-happy-path.e2e.test.ts test/protocol-artifact-conformance.test.ts test/adapters/s3-storage.test.ts test/delivery/public-path.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:artifact-gate:local: TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://codemagic_patch:codemagic_patch@127.0.0.1:55432/codemagic_patch_test TEST_S3_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:9100 TEST_S3_BUCKET=codemagic-patch TEST_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID=minio TEST_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=minio12345 TEST_S3_REGION=us-east-1 TEST_S3_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9100/codemagic-patch yarn run test:artifact-gate
scripts.test:full:local: TEST_DATABASE_URL=postgresql://codemagic_patch:codemagic_patch@127.0.0.1:55432/codemagic_patch_test TEST_S3_ENDPOINT=http://127.0.0.1:9100 TEST_S3_BUCKET=codemagic-patch TEST_S3_ACCESS_KEY_ID=minio TEST_S3_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=minio12345 TEST_S3_REGION=us-east-1 TEST_S3_PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:9100/codemagic-patch yarn exec vitest run
